name: Major Drilling Group International Inc.
description: Major Drilling Group International Inc. is one of the world’s largest specialized drilling service providers, primarily serving the mining industry. Established in 1980, the company offers a comprehensive range of drilling services, including surface and underground coring, directional, and specialized drilling. With a global presence spanning Canada, the United States, Latin America, Asia, Africa, and Europe, Major Drilling is recognized for its expertise in executing complex projects in challenging environments. The company is headquartered in Moncton, New Brunswick, and is publicly traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol MDI.
